landing.heroTitle: Clinical Companion: Grounded Decision Support for Field Healthcare Workers.
landing.heroDescription: Built for frontline teams that need a fast, clear, privacy-preserving workflow.

login.title: Sign in to Doctor Vai
login.description: Use your assigned clinical credentials to unlock the dashboard.
login.demoDescription: Sign in with worker@health.gov / password123 to simulate a clinician.

dashboard.title: Clinical workspace overview
dashboard.description: Start a session, review guidance, or move into risk and disease detection.

risk.title: Pre-treatment screening
risk.description: Collect pre-treatment data and return an attention flag without generating a definitive diagnosis.
risk.error: Unable to evaluate risk right now.

assistant.welcome: Ask anything about your uploaded knowledge base. I’ll search indexed documents and return grounded answers.
